mapper.select: SELECT id, title AS title, smrtnCntnt AS smrtnCntnt, Institution AS Institution, link AS link, fileDownUrl AS url FROM information_board WHERE typeCode = 1 AND link LIKE '%youtube%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_board WHERE typeCode = 1 AND link LIKE '%youtube%';
